General.Name: DONTNOD Entertainment SA
General.Description: Don't Nod Entertainment S.A. develop and publishes video games on PC and consoles worldwide. It offers games in various genres, including action-RPG, adventure narrative and action-adventure. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
